task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Todo CRUD API** (Level 4)

Build a full CRUD API for a Todos table with fields: title (required, text), done (boolean, defaults to false). POST /api/todos creates, GET /api/todos lists all, GET /api/todos/:id gets one, PUT /api/todos/:id updates, DELETE /api/todos/:id removes.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/todos wit
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false

when user sends todo to /api/todos:
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  saved = save todo as new Todos
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  send back all Todos

when user calls GET /api/todos/:id:
  send back the Todo with this id

when user sends changes to /api/todos/:id:
  requires login
  save changes to Todos
  send back changes

when user calls DELETE /api/todos/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Todos with this id
  send back 'deleted'
